National Provider Identifier CHAR 10
UNIQUE_PATIENT_ID Unique Model-Assigned Patient ID CHAR 36
ACTIVITY_DATE Encounter/Procedure/Diagnosis/Lab/Medication Start or Occurrence Date DATE 8
ACTIVITY_END_DATE Encounter/Procedure/Diagnosis End Date DATE 8
CODE Code Used to Document the Service CHAR 20
MODIFIER Any Modifiers for the Base Code CHAR 10
VALUE Value Provided for Certain Service Attributes CHAR 250
UNITS Unit for the Value Provided for Certain Service Attributes CHAR 10
CREATE_DATE Date
